standards.description: Identify and describe characteristics that distinguish living from non-living things
Observe and record basic life processes
Compare similarities and differences among living things
Describe relationships between organisms and their environment
Create simple food chains showing energy flow
Identify ways to protect local environments
Observe and describe properties of common substances
Identify the three states of matter in everyday objects
Demonstrate push and pull forces
Describe how forces cause motion or changes in motion
Identify different forms of energy in daily life
Describe basic energy sources
Describe major features of Earth's surface
Observe and record weather patterns
Explain the day-night cycle
Describe the Sun, Earth, and Moon
Explain what causes day and night
Observe and record moon phases
Use scientific process to investigate simple questions
Use basic tools for observation and measurement
Record observations using drawings and simple descriptions
